ddls:
CREATE TABLE "gift_baskets" (
  "gift_basket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gift basket */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the gift basket */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gift basket */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the gift basket */,
  "image_link" TEXT /* Link to the image of the gift basket */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the gift basket belongs */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the gift basket (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the gift basket was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the gift basket was last updated */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the gift basket's active period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gift_basket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gift_basket_contents" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content entry */,
  "gift_basket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gift basket the content belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item in the gift basket */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in the gift basket */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the content entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the content entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gift_basket_contents_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gift_basket_contents_gift_basket_id FOREIGN KEY ("gift_basket_id") REFERENCES gift_baskets ("gift_basket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., in-game currency, power-up) */,
  "item_subtype_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item subtype */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the item was last updated */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the item (e.g., common, rare, epic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gift_basket_durations" (
  "duration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each duration entry */,
  "gift_basket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gift basket the duration belongs to */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration for which the gift basket is active */,
  "duration_type" TEXT /* Type of duration (e.g., days, months) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the duration entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the duration entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("duration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gift_basket_durations_gift_basket_id FOREIGN KEY ("gift_basket_id") REFERENCES gift_baskets ("gift_basket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, moderator, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gift_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sending the gift */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the gift */,
  "gift_basket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gift basket being sent */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, cancelled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gift_transactions_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gift_transactions_gift_basket_id FOREIGN KEY ("gift_basket_id") REFERENCES gift_baskets ("gift_basket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gift_transactions_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_items" (
  "user_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user item entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the item */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item owned by the user */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date when the user acquired the item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user item entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user item entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_items_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gift_basket_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image entry */,
  "gift_basket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gift basket the image belongs to */,
  "image_link" TEXT /* Link to the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the image entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the image entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gift_basket_images_gift_basket_id FOREIGN KEY ("gift_basket_id") REFERENCES gift_baskets ("gift_basket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_types" (
  "item_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item type */,
  "item_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the item type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the item type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the item type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_subtypes" (
  "item_subtype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item subtype */,
  "item_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item type the subtype belongs to */,
  "item_subtype_name" TEXT /* Name of the item subtype */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item subtype */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the item subtype was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the item subtype was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_subtype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_subtypes_item_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_type_id") REFERENCES item_types ("item_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gift_basket_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gift_basket_category_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "gift_basket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gift basket */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gift_basket_category_map_gift_basket_id FOREIGN KEY ("gift_basket_id") REFERENCES gift_baskets ("gift_basket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gift_basket_category_map_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES gift_basket_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, transaction) */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gift_basket_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review entry */,
  "gift_basket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gift basket being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user writing the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review written by the user */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  "unhelpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of unhelpful votes the review has received */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gift_basket_reviews_gift_basket_id FOREIGN KEY ("gift_basket_id") REFERENCES gift_baskets ("gift_basket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gift_basket_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
